name: Gemini under-18 ban NOT enforced on the live (legacy) routing path
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L15-01] The Gemini/Vertex under-18 ban (MMT-ADR-0016) lives only inside the V2 routing branch (router.ts:564). LLM_ROUTING_V2_ENABLED defaults false in production, so the live (legacy) path falls through to the gemini_only branch (router.ts:568-575) and routes all such sessions to Gemini with no age check. Root cause: the age-based Gemini exclusion was implemented only in the V2 code path (getModelConfigV2), not backported to the legacy path. Fix: on the legacy path, when providerPolicy === 'gemini_only', add an age check — if the session is for an under-18 user, redirect to a compliant provider (Cerebras/OpenAI) instead of Gemini. Alternatively, flip the V2 cutover (risky without full V2 validation).
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: the Gemini exclusion for under-18 users exists only in the V2 routing branch (router.ts getModelConfigV2/getFallbackConfigV2); the legacy branch (providerPolicy=gemini_only at lines 568-575 and 689-690) has no age check and routes minor sessions to Gemini unconditionally. Behavioral variants: (a) Family plan standard rung — resolveExchangeLlmRouting returns gemini_only, legacy router sends to Gemini regardless of age; (b) Plus standard-rung minor — same path; (c) premium-addon standard-rung minor — same path; (d) V2 flag on — correctly routed (not affected). Variants (a-c) are the bug. Regression test: extend apps/api/src/services/llm/router.test.ts (or session-exchange-router.test.ts) with test cases that: (1) set routingV2Enabled=false, subscriptionTier='family', age<18 → assert the returned model config does NOT use provider 'gemini'; (2) same for Plus standard-rung with age<18; (3) confirm age>=18 on gemini_only path still routes to Gemini (no regression for adult Family users). Tests must fail before the fix and pass after.
riskImpact: Under-18 users (Family plan and potentially Plus standard-rung) are routed to Gemini/Vertex, violating Google's Gemini API terms (GCP SST §20(d)) which prohibit apps directed at or likely accessed by under-18 end users. This is a live compliance violation in production: LLM_ROUTING_V2_ENABLED defaults false, so the Gemini ban in the V2 branch is entirely inert and the legacy path routes all gemini_only policy sessions to Gemini regardless of age. Exposure: every Family/Plus standard-rung minor session in production.
